narrative.intro: You have managed to track down where they are holding your friend. It's time to have some diplomacy, Fringe-style!
narrative.briefing: Roll once on Hired Muscle Subtable. Enemy count is automatically 5 + any modifier from enemy table. Set up 2 basic sentries near center. Rest halfway between center and enemy edge in/near a building. One captive inside building.
narrative.completion_win: After the battle, your old comrade offers to join for the final battle (no Upkeep).
narrative.completion_lose: Comrade is flown off, but will join you after Event 7.

deployment.crew_setup: opposing battlefield edge, each figure moves onto battlefield in Round 1

sentries.placement: within a few inches of center of battlefield

main_force.placement: halfway between center and enemy battlefield edge, in/near central building

captive.placement: inside building, difficult to see spot

alert_triggers: Finish Move within 6" of an enemy
stealth_rules.alert_effect: Current round ends immediately after current figure resolves actions, then normal battle

sentry_detection.check: end of each round while sneaking
sentry_detection.method: Random direction per sentry, draw line to edge. If passes within 1" of crew in open: spotted. If within 1" of crew in Cover: roll 1D6+Savvy, 4+ to avoid.

stealth_rules.first_alert_round: Enemies confused: may Move (if no crew in sight) or remain and shoot without Aiming

enemies.count_method: 5 + modifier from enemy table (do NOT roll for count)

reinforcements_if_delayed.trigger: more than 3 campaign turns to locate captive
reinforcements_if_delayed.deployment_timing: one at a time starting round after alarm
reinforcements_if_delayed.stop_condition: if battlefield cleared, no more reinforcements arrive

captive.status: tied up, left alone during battle
captive.rescue_method: move into contact + non-Combat Action to free
captive.after_freed: can move and act normally, becomes valid target
captive.equipment: unarmed, can be given spare weapon from crew

primary.description: Free the captive and defeat the enemy force

win_captive_survived.description: Old comrade offers to join for the final battle, no Upkeep

flee_or_all_casualties.description: Comrade is flown off, but will join after Event 7
